page.content: The first table on tumorigenesis-related processes lists various protein symbols across five categories: carbohydrate and lipid metabolism, apoptosis, growth and proliferation, cell cycle, and hypoxia. In carbohydrate and lipid metabolism, the proteins are ACAA2, ACADM, ACAT1, AC02, ACSF2, ACY1, AKR1A1, ALDH2, ALDH4A1, ALDH6A1, ALDOA, ALDOB, ASS1, ATP5A1, BDH2, BHMT, CAT, CNDP2, DDC, ECHS1, ENO1, ETFB, FBP1, GAPDH, GATM, GOT2, GPD1, HADH, HSP27, IDH2, K4, KHK, LDHA, LDHB, MDH2, PCK2, PGK1, SORD, TP5B, TPI1; apoptosis includes ACAA2, ANXA2, ANXA4, ANXA5, CRYAB, CTSB, CYCS, ENO1, GAPDH, HSP27, HSPE1, LDHA, MIF, SELENBP1, SPD1; growth and proliferation features CAT, ENO1, FBP1, HNRNPA2B1, HSP27, HSPE1, LDHA, MIF, PRDX3, SELENBP1, SPD1; cell cycle is represented by ENO1, HSP27, HSPE1, MIF; and hypoxia includes ENO1, HSP27, LDHA. The second table on offspring and parent exams shows values for offspring exams o2, o3, o4, and o5 across parent exams pi2, pi3, pi4, and pi5: o2 has 0.39 ± 0.05, 0.35 ± 0.04, 0.36 ± 0.03, 0.31 ± 0.03; o3 has 0.43 ± 0.05, 0.41 ± 0.04, 0.40 ± 0.03, 0.34 ± 0.03; o4 has 0.49 ± 0.05, 0.49 ± 0.04, 0.45 ± 0.04, 0.39 ± 0.04; o5 has 0.34 ± 0.06, 0.38 ± 0.05, 0.37 ± 0.04, 0.32 ± 0.04.
